description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

pattern_alerts.description: Geopolitical binary underweighting — markets price best-case scenarios sooner than consensus forecasts
Defense sector duration premium — maximized in 2-6 week ceasefire (managed tension), not instant peace

framework_updates_implemented.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
framework_updates_implemented.rule: For any 3-outcome binary forecast, include explicit REVERSAL TRIGGER: 'If best-case materializes → regime flips, index +2-4%'. Do not rely on probability weighting alone.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Before making defense stock predictions, model the DURATION of tension. 2-6 weeks managed tension = HOLD/ADD defense. Instant peace = REDUCE defense. Acute escalation = defense spikes then reverses.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Central Bank Calendar Synchronization
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Always check RBI/Fed meeting calendar when forecasting on binary geopolitical event days. Same-day policy decisions can amplify moves by 1-2%.

prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}}. CEASEFIRE REGIME ACTIVE: 2-week suspension (April 8-22), Hormuz safe passage protocol confirmed. April 10 Islamabad talks are the NEXT binary event.

CONFIRMED CONTEXT FROM APRIL 8 EOD:
- Nifty: 23,997.35 (+3.78%, best day in 11 months)
- Sensex: 77,562.90 (+3.95%)
- Brent: $93.13 (down 17.55%)
- RBI kept policy repo rate unchanged (additional tailwind)
- IndiGo: ₹4,614.90 (+8.11%, hit upper circuit)
- ASTRA MICRO: ₹1,019.45 (P012 target ₹1,050-1,080 in sight)
- TCS: ₹2,555.30 (Q4 RESULTS ANNOUNCED TODAY April 9)
- ADANI PORT: ₹1,453.30 (Hormuz protocol active)
- SETFGOLD: ₹125.59 (A005 EXIT TRIGGER ACTIVATED — sell 50-75% at open)

PRIORITY 1 (CRITICAL — DO FIRST):
- Check TCS Q4FY26 results: Revenue growth YoY, EBIT margin, FY27 guidance, deal TCV. This drives P018, P014, and April 9 IT sector direction.

PRIORITY 2 (ACTION REQUIRED — SETFGOLD):
- A005 exit trigger has been activated (ceasefire + Hormuz confirmed). Check SETFGOLD opening price. If at/below ₹125, execute: SELL 50-75% of SETFGOLD position. Retain 25-30% for April 10 talks hedge. P020 predicts correction to ₹120-122.

PRIORITY 3 (WATCH):
- ASTRA MICRO: If approaching ₹1,050, consider partial profit-taking (25-35% of position). A008 action active.
- Brent: Stabilizing $90-95 = P017 (MRPL recovery) thesis confirmed. Spiking above $100 = concern.
- April 10 talks: Any early signals on Islamabad negotiations. Check news at 8 AM IST.

PREDICTIONS TO MONITOR TODAY:
- P018 (TCS >₹2,600) — will resolve within 24-48 hours on results
- P016 (Nifty 23,900-24,100) — tracking; April 10 talks setup drives direction
- P012 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,050-1,080) — 6 days remaining, check_date April 14
- P019 (ADANI PORT ₹1,490-1,540) — Hormuz protocol confirmation news?
- P020 (SETFGOLD ₹120-122) — check morning price vs ₹125.59 entry

FRAMEWORK UPDATES ACTIVE:
- FORECAST_PAT003: For any 3-outcome binary (Islamabad talks has 3 outcomes), include explicit reversal triggers
- M012: ASTRA MICRO defense premium maximized in 2-week managed tension. April 10 talks outcome = key risk
- RBI CALENDAR CHECK: Next RBI meeting? Add to morning context.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
(1) TCS Q4 results summary + P018/P014 status update, (2) SETFGOLD exit decision + P020 tracking, (3) Nifty open + GIFT Nifty if available, (4) Brent level check, (5) April 10 talks latest news, (6) Any FII April 8 official flow data, (7) Updated action urgencies for the day
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

FIRST: Read data/next-run-context.json for full context.

CRITICAL CHECKS FOR THIS RUN:
1. TCS Q4FY26 results were announced April 9 — score P018 (TCS >₹2,600). RIGHT or WRONG?
2. SETFGOLD — did P020 (₹120-122) start moving? What is closing price vs ₹125.59 entry?
3. April 10 Islamabad talks OUTCOME — this is a BINARY regime event. Check ALL news.
4. ASTRA MICRO — did it approach ₹1,050-1,080 (P012 target, check April 14)?
5. Nifty April 9 close vs P016 range (23,900-24,100) — tracking?
6. FII April 8 official flows — confirm direction.

STEPS:
1. Search: 'India market close {{DATE}}', 'TCS Q4 results {{DATE}}', 'Islamabad talks April 10 outcome' (if applicable)
2. SCORE PREDICTIONS DUE: check_date <= {{DATE}} AND outcome == null
3. For any WRONG: run RCA, check patterns
4. Update open prediction confidences
5. Recalculate accuracy-meta.json
6. GENERATE NEW PREDICTIONS (2-3, at least one 7D, multi-factor, no duplicates of open theses)
7. Update market_regime in actions.json based on Islamabad talks outcome
8. Generate {{TOMORROW_DATE}}-forecast.json
9. Write EOD brief to daily-briefings/{{DATE}}-eod.md
10. Update next-run-context.json (LAST STEP)
11. Git sync

KEY REGIME DECISION TREE FOR ISLAMABAD TALKS:
- TALKS PROGRESS → DE-ESCALATION_DEEPENING: Extend all positions except SETFGOLD (accelerate exit). Defense premium starts compressing.
- TALKS NEUTRAL → DE-ESCALATION_REAL continues: Maintain current positions. Review ceasefire expiry April 22.
- TALKS FAIL → WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN: Re-activate A002 INDIGO sell trigger. Hold all SETFGOLD. ASTRA MICRO new high potential. Nifty risk-off -2-4%.
session_forecast_accuracy_note: April 8 score: WRONG (predicted DOWN -0.8%, actual UP +3.78%). Running session accuracy: 50% (1/2). April 9 forecast pending. Root cause: FORECAST_PAT003.

scheduled_task_definitions.name: eod_wrap
scheduled_task_definitions.output: daily-briefings/YYYY-MM-DD-eod.md + predictions-history.json update + accuracy-meta.json update + market-forecasts.json + next-run-context.json update
